data.title: Blink UK To Install 41 EV Chargers At Princess Royal Hospital: Details
data.description: Blink Charging Co's subsidiary secures 3-year contract with Kings College NHS Trust to install and manage EV chargers and contactless payment terminals at flagship hospital, supporting greener transportation.

data.title: Interactive Strength Set To Acquire Fitness Equipment Company In Equity Swap, Eyeing Revenue And Market Expansion
data.description: Interactive Strength is acquiring a connected-fitness equipment company with $40M+ revenue and positive EBITDA, boosting its global market presence.

data.title: 'I Feel Like I'm Being Milked,' Miami Condo Residents Hit With A $21 Million Special Assessment For Repairs
Here's How Much $100 Invested In Adobe 20 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
European Central Bank Lowers Interest Rates, Fourth Cut In 2024 (UPDATED)
data.description: The European Central Bank on Thursday lowered the deposit rate by 25 basis points. The widely-anticipated move marks the ECB's fourth interest rate cut of the year.
